entry_contract: IN/OUT/OUT_BY or MT5 numeric 0/1/3; INOUT is refused
net_contract: profit + swap + commission + fee, aggregated once per position lifecycle
normalization_contract: book complete lifecycle net on final close UTC day and divide by RISK_PERCENT at first entry
ownership_contract: export must include every opening deal needed to resolve position_id; magic=0 broker closes inherit opening magic
time_contract: UTC timestamp with explicit offset, or Unix epoch seconds
type_contract: BUY/SELL or MT5 numeric 0/1; any non-trade row with non-zero profit/swap/commission/fee is refused as unallocated cashflow
